title: Toasted Smoky Italian Mozzarella Pizza
description: A charred and aerated solo dinner Italian dish featuring mozzarella, miso marinate, and kosher friendly ingredients, originating from the Lombard region of Italy.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit with a baking stone inside, if available.
Roll out the pizza dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch and place it on a piece of parchment paper.
In a small bowl, whisk together the miso paste and olive oil to create the miso marinate.
Brush the miso marinate evenly over the pizza dough, leaving a 1/2 inch border around the edges.
Sprinkle the shredded mozzarella cheese over the miso marinate, making sure to stay within the borders.
Season the pizza with salt, black pepper, and smoked paprika.
Slide the parchment paper onto the preheated baking stone and bake for 12 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the pizza from the oven and sprinkle with chopped fresh basil.
Let the pizza cool for 2 minutes before slicing and serving.
